description:
Goal: prove the new surface through the same fixture oracle the old compiler uses before any replacement planning resumes.

Signal:
- a representative `fz2` fixture leg exists and exercises the new control/data surface
- migration tickets can point at fixture-backed parity instead of one-off smoke tests

Change:
- extend the fixture/parity harness for a Compiler2-facing path once the language surface is actually supported
- pin a representative set of `case`/`with`/`receive`/map/struct/bitstring/macro fixtures through `fz2`

Why:
- we should not talk about cutover or scrap from hand-picked CLI tests alone; the fixture matrix is the real oracle surface
title: Compiler2 parity harness: add fz2 fixture coverage before cutover
